roadmap.title: Establish the idle loop and early party
roadmap.description: Clear Normal Acts 1 and 2, unlock Priest, open the three box types, reach early hero and kill milestones, and preserve useful gear while automatic retries build resources.

roadmap.title: Develop the Cube and equipment systems
roadmap.description: Reach Cube level 10, learn Synthesis, Alchemy, Crafting, Decoration, Engraving, Extraction, and Trading Ship, then continue Normal progression with a stable farming party.

roadmap.title: Push difficulty and high-grade gear
roadmap.description: Finish Normal, Nightmare, and Hell while raising a main hero, Cube level, gold income, gear grade, and Tier 5 enhancement materials.

roadmap.title: Finish endgame grinds and challenge clears
roadmap.description: Complete Torment and restricted-party boss runs, reach 100,000 kills and 100 million gold, level four heroes, repeat 100 inscriptions on one item, and fill the final 2/2/2 gear set.

achievements.description: Clear stage 1-1 for the first time.
achievements.summary: Clear Normal stage 1-1 (Pasture) for the first time.

guide.context: The stage map contains three acts with ten stages apiece, and each act's tenth stage is its Act Boss encounter.

steps.text: Select @loc{Normal stage 1-1 (Pasture)} from the stage map and deploy the strongest available party.
Let the party defeat all waves and remain on the result screen until the first-clear reward and Steam achievement register.

achievements.description: Clear stage 1-10 for the first time!
achievements.summary: Clear Normal stage 1-10 (Throne of Darkness) for the first time.

guide.context: The stage map contains three acts with ten stages apiece, and each act's tenth stage is its Act Boss encounter.

steps.text: Select @loc{Normal stage 1-10 (Throne of Darkness)} from the stage map and deploy the strongest available party.
Let the party defeat all waves and remain on the result screen until the first-clear reward and Steam achievement register.

achievements.description: Clear stage 2-10 for the first time!
achievements.summary: Clear Normal stage 2-10 (Pharaoh's Underchannel) for the first time.

guide.context: The stage map contains three acts with ten stages apiece, and each act's tenth stage is its Act Boss encounter.

steps.text: Select @loc{Normal stage 2-10 (Pharaoh's Underchannel)} from the stage map and deploy the strongest available party.
Let the party defeat all waves and remain on the result screen until the first-clear reward and Steam achievement register.

achievements.description: Clear Normal mode for the first time!
achievements.summary: Clear Normal difficulty by defeating the Act Boss in stage 3-10.

guide.context: The campaign has three acts and four sequential difficulty tiers. Upgrading equipment and farming a stage that clears reliably is safer than idling on a failing stage.

steps.text: Select @mechanic{Normal} and clear Acts 1 through 3 in order.
Complete @loc{Normal 3-10} and wait for the Act Boss result to record the full-difficulty clear.

achievements.description: Clear Nightmare mode for the first time!
achievements.summary: Clear Nightmare difficulty by defeating the Act Boss in stage 3-10.

guide.context: The campaign has three acts and four sequential difficulty tiers. Upgrading equipment and farming a stage that clears reliably is safer than idling on a failing stage.

steps.text: Select @mechanic{Nightmare} and clear Acts 1 through 3 in order.
Complete @loc{Nightmare 3-10} and wait for the Act Boss result to record the full-difficulty clear.

achievements.description: Clear Hell mode for the first time!
achievements.summary: Clear Hell difficulty by defeating the Act Boss in stage 3-10.

guide.context: The campaign has three acts and four sequential difficulty tiers. Upgrading equipment and farming a stage that clears reliably is safer than idling on a failing stage.

steps.text: Select @mechanic{Hell} and clear Acts 1 through 3 in order.
Complete @loc{Hell 3-10} and wait for the Act Boss result to record the full-difficulty clear.

achievements.description: Defeat 1,000 monsters.
achievements.summary: Defeat 1,000 monsters across all completed and repeated stages.

guide.context: Monster eliminations accumulate during active play and automatic stage repetition, so this total rises while farming hero experience, gold, boxes, and materials.

steps.text: Enable automatic retries on the highest stage the party clears consistently without dying.
Continue active or idle farming until the lifetime monster counter reaches 1,000.

achievements.description: Defeat 10,000 monsters.
achievements.summary: Defeat 10,000 monsters across all completed and repeated stages.

guide.context: Monster eliminations accumulate during active play and automatic stage repetition, so this total rises while farming hero experience, gold, boxes, and materials.

steps.text: Enable automatic retries on the highest stage the party clears consistently without dying.
Continue active or idle farming until the lifetime monster counter reaches 10,000.

achievements.description: Defeat 100,000 monsters.
achievements.summary: Defeat 100,000 monsters across all completed and repeated stages.

guide.context: Monster eliminations accumulate during active play and automatic stage repetition, so this total rises while farming hero experience, gold, boxes, and materials.

steps.text: Enable automatic retries on the highest stage the party clears consistently without dying.
Continue active or idle farming until the lifetime monster counter reaches 100,000.

achievements.description: Open 10 normal boxes.
achievements.summary: Open 10 normal monster boxes obtained from stage battles.

guide.context: Box rewards use server-enforced drop cooldowns, so faster clears do not guarantee a box on every run. Opening the stored box, rather than merely receiving it, advances the achievement.

steps.text: Repeat stages containing ordinary monsters until @item{normal monster boxes} enter the inventory.
Open each normal monster box from the inventory and continue until 10 have been opened.

achievements.description: Open 10 stage boss boxes.
achievements.summary: Open 10 Stage Boss boxes obtained from stage battles.

guide.context: Box rewards use server-enforced drop cooldowns, so faster clears do not guarantee a box on every run. Opening the stored box, rather than merely receiving it, advances the achievement.

steps.text: Repeat stages containing Stage Boss encounters until @item{Stage Boss boxes} enter the inventory.
Open each Stage Boss box from the inventory and continue until 10 have been opened.

achievements.description: Open 10 act boss boxes.
achievements.summary: Open 10 Act Boss boxes obtained from stage battles.

guide.context: Box rewards use server-enforced drop cooldowns, so faster clears do not guarantee a box on every run. Opening the stored box, rather than merely receiving it, advances the achievement.

steps.text: Repeat stages containing the tenth stage of each act until @item{Act Boss boxes} enter the inventory.
Open each Act Boss box from the inventory and continue until 10 have been opened.

achievements.description: Obtain an Arcana grade gear for the first time.
achievements.summary: Obtain and collect one piece of Arcana-grade gear.

guide.context: Arcana follows Immortal in the gear progression. The remaining upper grades rise through Beyond, Celestial, Divine, and finally Cosmic; these results can come from synthesis, crafting, Offering, or boss rewards.

steps.text: Farm stage and boss boxes while saving high-grade equipment and materials instead of alchemizing every drop.
Use the Cube's @mechanic{Synthesis}, @mechanic{Crafting}, or @mechanic{Offering} operations until Arcana-grade gear appears, then move the result into the inventory.

achievements.description: Obtain a Beyond grade gear for the first time.
achievements.summary: Obtain and collect one piece of Beyond-grade gear.

guide.context: Arcana follows Immortal in the gear progression. The remaining upper grades rise through Beyond, Celestial, Divine, and finally Cosmic; these results can come from synthesis, crafting, Offering, or boss rewards.

steps.text: Farm stage and boss boxes while saving high-grade equipment and materials instead of alchemizing every drop.
Use the Cube's @mechanic{Synthesis}, @mechanic{Crafting}, or @mechanic{Offering} operations until Beyond-grade gear appears, then move the result into the inventory.

achievements.description: Obtain a Celestial grade gear for the first time.
achievements.summary: Obtain and collect one piece of Celestial-grade gear.

guide.context: Arcana follows Immortal in the gear progression. The remaining upper grades rise through Beyond, Celestial, Divine, and finally Cosmic; these results can come from synthesis, crafting, Offering, or boss rewards.

steps.text: Farm stage and boss boxes while saving high-grade equipment and materials instead of alchemizing every drop.
Use the Cube's @mechanic{Synthesis}, @mechanic{Crafting}, or @mechanic{Offering} operations until Celestial-grade gear appears, then move the result into the inventory.

achievements.description: Obtain a Divine grade gear for the first time.
achievements.summary: Obtain and collect one piece of Divine-grade gear.

guide.context: Arcana follows Immortal in the gear progression. The remaining upper grades rise through Beyond, Celestial, Divine, and finally Cosmic; these results can come from synthesis, crafting, Offering, or boss rewards.

steps.text: Farm stage and boss boxes while saving high-grade equipment and materials instead of alchemizing every drop.
Use the Cube's @mechanic{Synthesis}, @mechanic{Crafting}, or @mechanic{Offering} operations until Divine-grade gear appears, then move the result into the inventory.

achievements.description: Obtain a Cosmic grade gear for the first time.
achievements.summary: Obtain and collect one piece of Cosmic-grade gear.

guide.context: Arcana follows Immortal in the gear progression. The remaining upper grades rise through Beyond, Celestial, Divine, and finally Cosmic; these results can come from synthesis, crafting, Offering, or boss rewards.

steps.text: Farm stage and boss boxes while saving high-grade equipment and materials instead of alchemizing every drop.
Use the Cube's @mechanic{Synthesis}, @mechanic{Crafting}, or @mechanic{Offering} operations until Cosmic-grade gear appears, then move the result into the inventory.

achievements.description: Successfully synthesize an Uncommon grade item for the first time.
achievements.summary: Use Synthesis to turn nine Common-grade items into an Uncommon-grade item.

guide.context: Synthesis requires nine items of one exact grade and one category; Gear, Accessories, and Materials cannot be mixed. A great success may skip the expected grade, so another batch may be needed for the named result.

steps.text: Open the Cube's @mechanic{Synthesis} operation and select nine spare Common-grade items from the same category.
Confirm Synthesis and collect the result; repeat if a great success skips past Uncommon.

achievements.description: Successfully synthesize a Rare grade item for the first time.
achievements.summary: Use Synthesis to turn nine Uncommon-grade items into a Rare-grade item.

guide.context: Synthesis requires nine items of one exact grade and one category; Gear, Accessories, and Materials cannot be mixed. A great success may skip the expected grade, so another batch may be needed for the named result.

steps.text: Open the Cube's @mechanic{Synthesis} operation and select nine spare Uncommon-grade items from the same category.
Confirm Synthesis and collect the result; repeat if a great success skips past Rare.

achievements.description: Successfully synthesize a Legendary grade item for the first time.
achievements.summary: Use Synthesis to turn nine Rare-grade items into a Legendary-grade item.

guide.context: Synthesis requires nine items of one exact grade and one category; Gear, Accessories, and Materials cannot be mixed. A great success may skip the expected grade, so another batch may be needed for the named result.

steps.text: Open the Cube's @mechanic{Synthesis} operation and select nine spare Rare-grade items from the same category.
Confirm Synthesis and collect the result; repeat if a great success skips past Legendary.

achievements.description: Successfully synthesize an Immortal grade item for the first time.
achievements.summary: Use Synthesis to turn nine Legendary-grade items into an Immortal-grade item.

guide.context: Synthesis requires nine items of one exact grade and one category; Gear, Accessories, and Materials cannot be mixed. A great success may skip the expected grade, so another batch may be needed for the named result.

steps.text: Open the Cube's @mechanic{Synthesis} operation and select nine spare Legendary-grade items from the same category.
Confirm Synthesis and collect the result; repeat if a great success skips past Immortal.

achievements.description: Successfully apply a Tier 1+ decoration option for the first time.
achievements.summary: Apply a Tier 1 or higher decoration stat to Rare-grade or better gear.

guide.context: Decoration unlocks at Cube level 8. The gear needs a free Decoration slot, and the matching material's tier determines the applied stat tier.

steps.text: Raise the Cube to level 8, then open @mechanic{Decoration} and choose Rare-grade or better gear with a free Decoration slot.
Insert a Tier 1 or higher Decoration material, confirm the recipe, and collect the gear after the new stat appears.

achievements.description: Successfully apply a Tier 5+ decoration option for the first time.
achievements.summary: Apply a Tier 5 or higher decoration stat to Rare-grade or better gear.

guide.context: Decoration unlocks at Cube level 8. The gear needs a free Decoration slot, and the matching material's tier determines the applied stat tier.

steps.text: Raise the Cube to level 8, then open @mechanic{Decoration} and choose Rare-grade or better gear with a free Decoration slot.
Insert a Tier 5 or higher Decoration material, confirm the recipe, and collect the gear after the new stat appears.

achievements.description: Successfully apply a Tier 1+ engraving option for the first time.
achievements.summary: Apply a Tier 1 or higher engraving stat to Immortal-grade or better gear.

guide.context: Engraving unlocks at Cube level 15. The gear needs a free Engraving slot, and the matching material's tier determines the applied stat tier.

steps.text: Raise the Cube to level 15, then open @mechanic{Engraving} and choose Immortal-grade or better gear with a free Engraving slot.
Insert a Tier 1 or higher Engraving material, confirm the recipe, and collect the gear after the new stat appears.

achievements.description: Successfully apply a Tier 5+ engraving option for the first time.
achievements.summary: Apply a Tier 5 or higher engraving stat to Immortal-grade or better gear.

guide.context: Engraving unlocks at Cube level 15. The gear needs a free Engraving slot, and the matching material's tier determines the applied stat tier.

steps.text: Raise the Cube to level 15, then open @mechanic{Engraving} and choose Immortal-grade or better gear with a free Engraving slot.
Insert a Tier 5 or higher Engraving material, confirm the recipe, and collect the gear after the new stat appears.

achievements.description: Successfully apply a Tier 1+ inscription option for the first time.
achievements.summary: Apply a Tier 1 or higher inscription stat to Arcana-grade or better gear.

guide.context: Inscription unlocks at Cube level 25. The gear needs a free Inscription slot, and the matching material's tier determines the applied stat tier.

steps.text: Raise the Cube to level 25, then open @mechanic{Inscription} and choose Arcana-grade or better gear with a free Inscription slot.
Insert a Tier 1 or higher Inscription material, confirm the recipe, and collect the gear after the new stat appears.

achievements.description: Successfully apply a Tier 5+ inscription option for the first time.
achievements.summary: Apply a Tier 5 or higher inscription stat to Arcana-grade or better gear.

guide.context: Inscription unlocks at Cube level 25. The gear needs a free Inscription slot, and the matching material's tier determines the applied stat tier.

steps.text: Raise the Cube to level 25, then open @mechanic{Inscription} and choose Arcana-grade or better gear with a free Inscription slot.
Insert a Tier 5 or higher Inscription material, confirm the recipe, and collect the gear after the new stat appears.

achievements.description: Successfully make an offering for the first time.
achievements.summary: Spend an Anniversary Coin in the Cube's Offering operation and collect the resulting gear.

guide.context: Offering unlocks at Cube level 20. Each Anniversary Coin has its own gold fee and weighted grade distribution, but every successful offer produces one random gear item.

steps.text: Raise the Cube to level 20 and obtain any @item{Anniversary Coin}.
Open @mechanic{Offering}, place the coin in the recipe, pay the displayed gold fee, and collect the generated gear.

achievements.description: Successfully craft a Common grade or higher accessory for the first time.
achievements.summary: Use the Cube to craft an accessory of Common grade or higher.

guide.context: Crafting unlocks at Cube level 5. Selecting Accessory fixes the gear slot, while the recipe tier determines the material requirement and grade odds.

steps.text: Open the Cube's @mechanic{Crafting} operation, choose @item{Accessory}, and select an available recipe tier.
Load the materials shown by that recipe and craft repeatedly until an accessory of Common grade or higher is collected.

achievements.description: Successfully craft an Immortal grade or higher accessory for the first time.
achievements.summary: Use the Cube to craft an accessory of Immortal grade or higher.

guide.context: Crafting unlocks at Cube level 5. Selecting Accessory fixes the gear slot, while the recipe tier determines the material requirement and grade odds.

steps.text: Open the Cube's @mechanic{Crafting} operation, choose @item{Accessory}, and select an available recipe tier.
Load the materials shown by that recipe and craft repeatedly until an accessory of Immortal grade or higher is collected.

achievements.description: Reach Cube level 10.
achievements.summary: Raise the Cube to level 10 by feeding items into Cube operations.

guide.context: Alchemy, Synthesis, Crafting, and Offering award Cube experience for consumed items; Decoration, Engraving, Inscription, and Extraction award none. Items near the Cube's level give better experience than badly mismatched gear.

steps.text: Lock equipment worth keeping, then send surplus drops through Alchemy or use them in Synthesis, Crafting, and Offering.
Continue consuming appropriately leveled items until the Cube reaches level 10.

achievements.description: Reach Cube level 50.
achievements.summary: Raise the Cube to level 50 by feeding items into Cube operations.

guide.context: Alchemy, Synthesis, Crafting, and Offering award Cube experience for consumed items; Decoration, Engraving, Inscription, and Extraction award none. Items near the Cube's level give better experience than badly mismatched gear.

steps.text: Lock equipment worth keeping, then send surplus drops through Alchemy or use them in Synthesis, Crafting, and Offering.
Continue consuming appropriately leveled items until the Cube reaches level 50.

achievements.description: List an item on the Trading Ship for the first time.
achievements.summary: List one transferable item on the Trading Ship.

guide.context: The achievement requires a completed listing rather than a completed sale. Item eligibility can vary, so prepare an unequipped item that the current interface accepts.

steps.text: Open @mechanic{Trading Ship} from the Cube interface and choose an unequipped item that the interface marks as transferable.
Confirm the listing and wait until the item appears as listed rather than merely selected.

achievements.description: Unlock the Bat pet.
achievements.summary: Unlock the Bat pet by defeating 5,000 Bat monsters.

guide.context: Stage 1-7, City Outskirts, is the densest documented Bat farm; higher difficulties contain more Bats per clear, with Torment offering about 204 per run.

steps.text: Select the highest reliably cleared version of @loc{1-7 City Outskirts} and enable automatic retries.
Keep farming until 5,000 @enemy{Bats} have been defeated and the Bat pet unlock notification appears.

achievements.description: Reach Hero level 10 for the first time.
achievements.summary: Raise one hero to level 10 through stage and offline experience.

guide.context: A hero gains experience from stage farming and up to eight hours of offline rewards. Concentrating the strongest equipment on one main hero reaches the single-hero milestones sooner.

steps.text: Keep the chosen hero deployed while repeating the highest stage that clears consistently.
Collect active and offline experience until that hero reaches level 10.

achievements.description: Reach Hero level 20 for the first time.
achievements.summary: Raise one hero to level 20 through stage and offline experience.

guide.context: A hero gains experience from stage farming and up to eight hours of offline rewards. Concentrating the strongest equipment on one main hero reaches the single-hero milestones sooner.

steps.text: Keep the chosen hero deployed while repeating the highest stage that clears consistently.
Collect active and offline experience until that hero reaches level 20.

achievements.description: Reach Hero level 30 for the first time.
achievements.summary: Raise one hero to level 30 through stage and offline experience.

guide.context: A hero gains experience from stage farming and up to eight hours of offline rewards. Concentrating the strongest equipment on one main hero reaches the single-hero milestones sooner.

steps.text: Keep the chosen hero deployed while repeating the highest stage that clears consistently.
Collect active and offline experience until that hero reaches level 30.

achievements.description: Reach Hero level 50 for the first time.
achievements.summary: Raise one hero to level 50 through stage and offline experience.

guide.context: A hero gains experience from stage farming and up to eight hours of offline rewards. Concentrating the strongest equipment on one main hero reaches the single-hero milestones sooner.

steps.text: Keep the chosen hero deployed while repeating the highest stage that clears consistently.
Collect active and offline experience until that hero reaches level 50.

achievements.description: Reach Hero level 60 for the first time.
achievements.summary: Raise one hero to level 60 through stage and offline experience.

guide.context: A hero gains experience from stage farming and up to eight hours of offline rewards. Concentrating the strongest equipment on one main hero reaches the single-hero milestones sooner.

steps.text: Keep the chosen hero deployed while repeating the highest stage that clears consistently.
Collect active and offline experience until that hero reaches level 60.

achievements.description: Reach Hero level 70 for the first time.
achievements.summary: Raise one hero to level 70 through stage and offline experience.

guide.context: A hero gains experience from stage farming and up to eight hours of offline rewards. Concentrating the strongest equipment on one main hero reaches the single-hero milestones sooner.

steps.text: Keep the chosen hero deployed while repeating the highest stage that clears consistently.
Collect active and offline experience until that hero reaches level 70.

achievements.description: Reach Hero level 80 for the first time.
achievements.summary: Raise one hero to level 80 through stage and offline experience.

guide.context: A hero gains experience from stage farming and up to eight hours of offline rewards. Concentrating the strongest equipment on one main hero reaches the single-hero milestones sooner.

steps.text: Keep the chosen hero deployed while repeating the highest stage that clears consistently.
Collect active and offline experience until that hero reaches level 80.

achievements.description: Unlock the Priest hero.
achievements.summary: Spend 500 gold to unlock the Priest hero.

guide.context: Priest is a healer and support hero who equips a Scepter and Tome; adding the class early improves survival during multi-hero progression.

steps.text: Earn at least 500 gold, open the hero roster, and select @npc{Priest}.
Pay the displayed 500-gold unlock cost and wait for Priest to become selectable for the active party.

achievements.description: Raise 4 heroes to level 50 or above.
achievements.summary: Raise four different heroes to level 50 or higher.

guide.context: Experience belongs to individual heroes, so one level-50 main does not satisfy the four-hero total. Rotate the fourth hero into a stable farming party rather than leaving every secondary hero undeployed.

steps.text: Unlock at least four heroes and place each under-levelled hero in a party that can safely repeat a productive stage.
Farm active and offline experience until four separate hero records show level 50 or higher.

achievements.description: Clear Hell 3-10 solo.
achievements.summary: Clear Hell stage 3-10 with exactly 1 active hero.

guide.context: Party size is checked for the Act Boss clear, so extra unlocked heroes must remain outside the deployed party. Attempt this after ordinary difficulty progression and major gear upgrades.

steps.text: Open party setup, deploy exactly one heavily geared hero, and leave every other hero undeployed.
Select @loc{Hell 3-10}, defeat the Act Boss without adding another party member, and remain through the clear result.

achievements.description: Clear Torment 3-10 with a 2-player party.
achievements.summary: Clear Torment stage 3-10 with exactly 2 active heroes.

guide.context: Party size is checked for the Act Boss clear, so extra unlocked heroes must remain outside the deployed party. Attempt this after ordinary difficulty progression and major gear upgrades.

steps.text: Open party setup, deploy exactly two heavily geared heroes, and leave every other hero undeployed.
Select @loc{Torment 3-10}, defeat the Act Boss without adding another party member, and remain through the clear result.

achievements.description: Attempt inscription 100 times on the same item.
achievements.summary: Perform 100 Inscription attempts on the same Arcana-grade or better gear item.

guide.context: Inscription unlocks at Cube level 25, and Arcana gear has one Inscription slot while Celestial-or-better gear has two. Extraction frees an occupied slot but destroys the applied material, allowing the same item to be inscribed again.

steps.text: Choose one permanent Arcana-grade or better gear item and keep it locked so it cannot be consumed or sold.
Apply an Inscription, use @mechanic{Extraction} to clear that Inscription slot when necessary, and apply another material to the same gear item.
Repeat the inscription-and-extraction cycle until the hundredth attempt registers.

achievements.description: Complete all decoration/engraving/inscription on all equipped gear (for items with 2/2/2 slots).
achievements.summary: Fill both Decoration, both Engraving, and both Inscription slots on every equipped 2/2/2-slot gear item.

guide.context: Celestial, Divine, and Cosmic gear provide two slots for each of the three enhancement systems. This is an endgame material and gold sink, so complete it only after settling on the equipped high-grade gear set.

steps.text: Equip the intended Celestial-grade or better endgame set and verify that every equipped item shows two Decoration, two Engraving, and two Inscription slots.
For every equipped item, use the Cube to fill all six slots with matching materials; extract and replace a stat only when a required slot remains empty.
Recheck the entire equipped set and leave no Decoration, Engraving, or Inscription slot unfilled.

achievements.displayName: In the Blink of an Eye
achievements.description: Clear any stage within 10 seconds.
achievements.summary: Clear any complete stage in 10 seconds or less.

guide.context: Returning to an early Normal stage after obtaining stronger gear is more reliable than trying to meet the timer during current progression.

steps.text: Equip the strongest damage and movement-speed setup, then select @loc{Normal 1-1 Pasture}.
Start the stage and defeat every wave before the run timer exceeds 10 seconds.

achievements.description: Clear Normal 3-10 act boss with 2 party members dead in a 3-player party.
achievements.summary: Clear Normal stage 3-10 with three heroes deployed and exactly two party members dead when the Act Boss falls.

guide.context: Version 1.01.01 fixed dead party members failing to revive or disappearing after a restart. For this achievement, avoid Priest's Resurrection so the two fallen heroes remain dead for the final blow.

steps.text: Deploy three heroes on @loc{Normal 3-10}, remove @mechanic{Resurrection} from Priest if present, and let two weaker heroes die during the Act Boss fight.
Use the surviving over-geared hero to defeat the boss while the other two party portraits still show dead, then remain through the result.

achievements.description: Clear Nightmare 3-10 act boss without getting hit.
achievements.summary: Clear the Nightmare 3-10 Act Boss fight without any deployed hero taking a hit.

guide.context: A ranged burst party reduces exposure by defeating the boss before its first attack connects. Damage avoidance, not merely surviving with full healing afterward, is the condition.

steps.text: Over-gear a fast ranged damage party, select @loc{Nightmare 3-10}, and begin the Act Boss encounter.
Restart immediately if any hero takes damage; otherwise defeat the boss and remain through the no-hit clear result.

achievements.description: Earn 1,000 gold.
achievements.summary: Earn a cumulative total of 1,000 gold from combat, rewards, and Cube operations.

guide.context: Gold continues accumulating from repeated stages and Alchemy, while offline rewards can cover at most eight hours between check-ins.

steps.text: Repeat a stable stage for combat gold and send unwanted items through the Cube's Alchemy operation.
Continue earning gold until the lifetime total reaches 1,000.

achievements.description: Earn 1,000,000 gold.
achievements.summary: Earn a cumulative total of 1,000,000 gold from combat, rewards, and Cube operations.

guide.context: Gold continues accumulating from repeated stages and Alchemy, while offline rewards can cover at most eight hours between check-ins.

steps.text: Repeat a stable stage for combat gold and send unwanted items through the Cube's Alchemy operation.
Continue earning gold until the lifetime total reaches 1,000,000.

achievements.description: Earn 100,000,000 gold.
achievements.summary: Earn a cumulative total of 100,000,000 gold from combat, rewards, and Cube operations.

guide.context: Gold continues accumulating from repeated stages and Alchemy, while offline rewards can cover at most eight hours between check-ins.

steps.text: Repeat a stable stage for combat gold and send unwanted items through the Cube's Alchemy operation.
Continue earning gold until the lifetime total reaches 100,000,000.

achievements.description: Earn 1,000 gold through alchemy.
achievements.summary: Earn a cumulative total of 1,000 gold specifically through Cube Alchemy.

guide.context: Alchemy unlocks at Cube level 1 and converts one to nine items at once into gold. Higher grades return more gold, and consumed items also grant Cube experience.

steps.text: Open @mechanic{Alchemy}, lock every item worth keeping, and load up to nine unwanted items.
Confirm each conversion and continue alchemizing surplus drops until Alchemy earnings reach 1,000 gold.

achievements.description: Earn 1,000,000 gold through alchemy.
achievements.summary: Earn a cumulative total of 1,000,000 gold specifically through Cube Alchemy.

guide.context: Alchemy unlocks at Cube level 1 and converts one to nine items at once into gold. Higher grades return more gold, and consumed items also grant Cube experience.

steps.text: Open @mechanic{Alchemy}, lock every item worth keeping, and load up to nine unwanted items.
Confirm each conversion and continue alchemizing surplus drops until Alchemy earnings reach 1,000,000 gold.

achievements.description: Successfully extract for the first time.
achievements.summary: Use Cube Extraction to remove one applied stat from a piece of gear.

guide.context: Extraction unlocks at Cube level 10, reopens one Decoration, Engraving, or Inscription slot, and permanently destroys the material that created the removed stat.

steps.text: Raise the Cube to level 10 and choose gear that already has a Decoration, Engraving, or Inscription stat.
Open @mechanic{Extraction}, select that applied stat, pay the displayed gold cost, and collect the gear with the slot reopened.
